name: TurboQuant Context Compression
description: Compresses conversation history before every API call — fewer tokens sent, lower cost, faster responses. Inspired by Google's TurboQuant KV-cache compression research.

keepRecentTurns.description: Number of most recent turns to keep verbatim (not compressed)

compressionRatio.description: Target compression ratio for old turns (0.25 = keep 25% of tokens)

minTurnsBeforeCompression.description: Don't compress until conversation has at least this many turns
